description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:18.04 Docker image and defines a single deploy stage with three jobs: pages, pages_development, and test:p3. The pages job runs only on the release branch, sets DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive, updates apt, installs python3-dev python3-pip python3-numpy python3-scipy python3-h5py python3-matplotlib xvfb python3-setuptools python3-psutil, upgrades pip, installs xvfb python3-sphinx python3-sphinx-rtd-theme build-essential, runs pip3 install tqdm scikit-image and pip3 install --user ., generates Sphinx docs with sphinx-apidoc -fT -o ./doc ./fpd/ ./fpd/tests, builds HTML with make html, moves doc/_build/html to public, and publishes the public directory as a pages artifact. The pages_development job is identical but runs only on the master branch and moves the built HTML to pages_development, publishing that directory as an artifact. The test:p3 job runs on all branches, sets DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive, updates apt, installs the same Python packages plus python3-coverage, upgrades pip, installs pip3 install tqdm scikit-image==0.16.2, pip3 install hyperspy==1.5.1, pip3 install -U numpy, pip3 install -U scipy, installs the project with pip3 install --user ., then executes xvfb-run python3-coverage run -m unittest discover -p test*.py ./ and creates a coverage report with python3-coverage report --include=*fpd* --omit=*test* | tee coverage.txt, storing coverage.txt as an artifact. No caches are defined.
